title: Aureline waiver-expiry and remembered-decision vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the waiver_expiry_record, the remembered_decision_record, and the decision_replay_audit_event_record frozen in docs/governance/record_state_and_policy_simulation_models.md. Every waiver (backup-owner absent, freeze exception, policy narrowing, retention exception, export suppression, delete suppression, disclosure opt-out) and every remembered decision (user or admin 'do not ask again' / 'always allow' / 'always deny' / 'defer until X' answer) carries a typed expiry chronology, a typed renewal policy, and an explicit reprompt / escalation path. Raw justifications, raw reviewer identity bytes, raw subject bodies, and raw decision prompt text never cross the RPC boundary; this schema carries ids and typed vocabulary only. Every record shares the chronology_packet contract defined in schemas/governance/record_state.schema.json so absolute time, civil time, monotonic duration, and skew are disclosed consistently across the record-state, transition-event, simulation, and waiver / remembered-decision surfaces. Adding a new waiver class, expiry kind, renewal policy, escalation path, decision posture, applicable-scope value, reprompt behavior, or audit-event id is additive-minor and requires a waiver_expiry_schema_version bump; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

waiver_expiry_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this waiver-expiry vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / claim manifests / evidence packets.

chronology_packet.description: Chronology packet shared with record_state.schema.json. All waiver and remembered-decision chronology fields (declared, expires, renewed, superseded) use this contract so absolute time, civil time, monotonic duration, skew, ordering, and representation rules stay consistent across the governance surfaces.

subject_ref.description: Typed subject reference shared with record_state.schema.json. A waiver or remembered decision whose subject cannot be typed denies with subject_kind_unresolved rather than defaulting.

waiver_kind.description: Frozen waiver-kind vocabulary. backup_owner_absent = a protected lane is running without a named backup owner. policy_narrowing = a decision was narrowed past its freeze deadline and the waiver records that narrowing. freeze_exception = a freeze-window exception was granted. retention_exception = a record is retained past its policy ceiling under an exception. export_suppression / delete_suppression = an export or delete is suppressed under an exception. disclosure_opt_out = a user or admin opted out of a disclosure prompt. admin_reconfirmation_defer = an admin-reconfirmation requirement is deferred to a later moment. remembered_decision_binding = the waiver binds a remembered decision to its expiry envelope. capability_lifecycle_override = an override on a capability_lifecycle row. single_maintainer_backup = the solo-maintainer posture standing waiver. A waiver whose kind cannot be typed denies with waiver_kind_unresolved rather than defaulting.

expiry_kind.description: Frozen expiry-kind vocabulary. absolute_calendar = a specific chronology. relative_duration = N units from declared_chronology (duration_ms required). policy_epoch_bound = expires when the policy epoch bumps (policy_epoch_ref required). version_bound = expires when a named surface version bumps past a floor (version_ref required). event_bound = expires on a named event (event_binding required). never_expires = no expiry (rare; reserved for standing system waivers).

relative_duration_clock_source.description: Frozen relative-duration clock-source vocabulary. wall_clock_since_declared = measured against civil time; affected by clock adjustment. monotonic_since_declared = measured against a monotonic clock; clock adjustments do not reset the expiry. policy_epoch_age = measured against the age of the policy_epoch in effect at declaration. session_age = measured against the session / workspace open lifetime.

event_binding.description: Frozen event-binding vocabulary used when expiry_kind = event_bound.

renewal_policy.description: Frozen renewal-policy vocabulary. Surfaces MUST render the renewal_policy verbatim; a generic 'expired' label without naming the renewal path is non-conforming.

escalation_path.description: Frozen escalation-path vocabulary taken when renewal_policy requires reconfirmation.

waiver_status.description: Frozen waiver-status vocabulary. active = currently in force. expired_silent = expired and no reprompt was surfaced (only admissible for renewal_policy = auto_extend_*); otherwise expiry emits expired_with_reprompt. renewed = expiry fired and the waiver was renewed. superseded = a new waiver replaces it (superseded_by required). retired = the waiver was retired by its owner. force_retired_by_policy = policy forcibly retired the waiver (e.g. on an epoch bump). A waiver whose status cannot be resolved denies with waiver_status_unresolved.

decision_posture.description: Frozen decision-posture vocabulary for remembered decisions. 'opt_out_of_reprompt' is only admissible when the decision_subject is classed as low-risk reprompt; high-risk decisions (destructive operations, policy overrides, export / delete suppressions) MUST NOT carry opt_out_of_reprompt.

applicable_scope.description: Frozen applicable-scope vocabulary for remembered decisions. A remembered decision whose scope cannot be typed denies with applicable_scope_unresolved.

reprompt_behavior_after_expiry.description: Frozen reprompt-behavior vocabulary when a remembered decision expires. hard_deny_with_explanation = after expiry the request fails closed with a typed explanation, not a silent deny. replay_decision_with_disclosure = the prior decision is re-offered as the default, but the disclosure must be re-shown.

audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the waiver / remembered-decision audit stream.

actor_ref.description: Actor reference. Redaction-aware; never carries raw identifier bytes. Null for policy-engine / system triggers.

absolute_expiry_chronology.description: Required when expiry_kind = absolute_calendar. Null otherwise.

relative_duration_ms.description: Duration in milliseconds. Required when expiry_kind = relative_duration. Null otherwise.

relative_duration_clock_source.description: Required when expiry_kind = relative_duration. Null otherwise.

policy_epoch_ref.description: Required when expiry_kind = policy_epoch_bound. Null otherwise.

version_ref.description: Required when expiry_kind = version_bound. Null otherwise.

event_binding.description: Required when expiry_kind = event_bound. Null otherwise.

superseded_by.description: Opaque id of the waiver that superseded this one. Required when status = superseded. Null otherwise.

last_status_chronology.description: Chronology of the most recent status transition. Null for a just-minted waiver whose only status is 'active'.

linked_governed_record_refs.description: Governed-record ids whose state is narrowed, extended, or suppressed by this waiver. A non-empty list enforces cross-reference with record_state.schema.json.

allOf.description: expiry_kind = relative_duration requires relative_duration_ms and relative_duration_clock_source.

expired_silent status is only admissible for renewal_policy in { auto_extend_if_subject_unchanged, auto_extend_if_policy_epoch_unchanged }. Other renewal policies MUST emit expired_with_reprompt on expiry.

question_ref.description: Typed reference to the prompt / question the user answered. A remembered decision whose question cannot be typed denies with question_kind_unresolved. Raw prompt text never appears here.

subject_ref.description: Subject the decision binds to (e.g. the filesystem object whose deletion was allowed). Null for cross-subject global postures.

bound_to_actor_ref.description: Actor the decision is bound to. Null for applicable_scope = global / per_device.

expiry_ref.description: Opaque id resolving to a waiver_expiry_record whose subject is this remembered decision. Remembered decisions without an expiry_ref are only admissible when decision_posture = opt_out_of_reprompt AND applicable_scope != global; otherwise an expiry_ref is required.

last_replay_chronology.description: Chronology at which the remembered decision was last quoted against a live prompt. Surfaces the 'last used' line on admin explainability pages.

allOf.description: decision_posture = opt_out_of_reprompt with applicable_scope = global MUST still name an expiry_ref; standing global opt-outs are forbidden.

subject_id.description: Id of the waiver or remembered_decision the event is about.

subject_record_kind.description: Which kind of subject the event addresses. Consumers use this to pick the right schema to validate the subject against.

previous_value.description: Previous value on the affected field (status, expiry_kind, decision_posture, applicable_scope, reprompt_behavior_after_expiry). Null for minted / retired events.

next_value.description: Next value on the affected field. Null for minted / retired events.

observer_subject.description: Stable subject reference for the observer that recorded the event (surface id, policy-engine id, reprompt dialog id). Never a raw token.

linked_governed_record_ref.description: Governed-record id whose state was gated by the waiver / remembered decision at the moment the event fired.
